title: Normalize Usernames
problem_statement: Fix src/text_tools.py. normalize_username should trim leading/trailing whitespace, lowercase the username, collapse any internal whitespace run to a single dash, and raise ValueError for blank input. Keep the public function name unchanged.

title: Invoice Totals
problem_statement: Fix src/invoice.py. invoice_total should multiply price by quantity, default missing quantity to 1, reject negative quantities with ValueError, apply tax_rate, and return a float rounded to two decimal places.
